'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=fyEBlP5M0yMrCv8EIyIz3SCFsaAbcm6natTEuBksGo8-1774624445-1.0.1.1-b_WPnqD6yn4Zg12Pb0rO5p3WphTLNE3FLh_E6o92GWM"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
